title: Dreamy Algerian Reblochon Gratin
description: A sweet and gooey Algerian dish featuring reblochon cheese, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is a delight to make and eat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Add the softened reblochon cheese to the bowl and stir until the cheese is fully incorporated.
Add the chopped parsley and minced garlic to the bowl and stir to combine.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with the olive oil.
Pour the egg and cheese mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Place the dish under the broiler and cook for 5 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
